title: Agent Definition Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter contract for Claude Code subagent definitions in .claude/agents/*.md. The name must be a lowercase-hyphen identifier matching the file stem so the harness can address the agent.

name.description: Unique agent identifier: lowercase letters, digits, and single hyphens. Must equal the markdown file stem.

description.description: What the agent does and when to use it. Shown in agent pickers, so it must carry meaning on its own.

color.description: Display color: a CSS-style named color (e.g. amber) or a 6-digit hex value.

emoji.description: Short emoji badge for the agent.

tools.description: Optional tool allowlist: a comma-separated string or a list of tool names. Omit to inherit all tools.

model.description: Optional model override for the agent.
